idea: Tracking construction dumpster activity to predict housing starts
behavior: Analyzing the volume and frequency of construction dumpster requests can provide an early signal for upcoming housing starts.

market_impact.rationale: Housing starts are a leading indicator for the homebuilding and related sectors.

trade_logic.entry: If dumpster requests in a metro area increase 10% month-over-month
trade_logic.exit: After 30 trading days or if the dumpster requests stop rising
